config.description:
Yaml format Sarama config for Kafka connection.
It follows the struct of sarama.Config. See https://github.com/IBM/sarama/blob/main/config.go
e.g.

consumer:
  fetch:
    min: 1
net:
  MaxOpenRequests: 5

+optional

connectionBackoff.description: Backoff holds parameters applied to connection.

jsonBody.name:
JSONBody specifies that all event body payload coming from this
source will be JSON
+optional

limitEventsPerSecond.name:
Sets a limit on how many events get read from kafka per second.
+optional

metadata.name:
Metadata holds the user defined metadata which will passed along the event payload.
+optional

sasl.name:
SASL configuration for the kafka client
+optional

schemaRegistry.name:
Schema Registry configuration for consumer message with Avro format
+optional

tls.name:
TLS configuration for the kafka client.
+optional

url.name: URL to kafka cluster, multiple URLs separated by comma

version.name:
Specify what kafka version is being connected to enables certain features in sarama, defaults to 1.0.0
+optional
